name: SDLC Phases
title: SDLC Phases and Operational Concepts
description: Defines the 7-phase Meta-Orchestration cycle used by the Antigravity Agent Factory, covering Ideation through Deployment and Monitoring.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Every phase mandates a specific Gate Artifact that must be approved before proceeding to the next phase, creating a strictly verifiable chain of evidence.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: The user retains final approval at every phase boundary, ensuring execution matches intent.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: The 7-phase model makes the meta-orchestrator's internal state completely visible via Plane issues and knowledge graph updates.
axiomAlignment.A4_non_harm: Enforced phase gates prevent destructive code execution without an approved architecture design.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Standardizes the execution loop across all factory workflows.

P1_Ideation.description: Goal: Define the Vision. Workflows: /brainstorm, /cluster. Gate Artifact: prototype-brief.md
P1_Ideation.use_when: The user presents a vague request that needs to be crystallized into an actionable product brief.
P1_Ideation.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow brief-prototype
best_practices: Generate at least 20 raw ideas during brainstorming.
Group ideas into Opportunity Clusters.
Formalize the selected cluster into a Prototype Brief.

P2_Requirements.description: Goal: Define 'Ready'. Workflows: /write-prd, /elicit-nfr. Gate Artifact: prd.md
P2_Requirements.use_when: A Prototype Brief has been approved and needs formal functional and non-functional requirements.
P2_Requirements.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow write-prd
best_practices: Use Socratic elicitation for NFRs.
Have an adversarial agent act as a Judge to review the PRD.

P3_Architecture.description: Goal: Define the System. Workflows: /ai-system-design. Gate Artifact: ai-design.md
P3_Architecture.use_when: The PRD is complete and technical decisions (stack, APIs, data schemas) must be formalized before coding.
P3_Architecture.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow ai-system-design
best_practices: Create Mermaid diagrams for visual clarity.
Generate strict API contracts.
Use the Multi-Agent Debate pattern for architectural disputes.

P4_Build.description: Goal: Execution and Implementation. Workflows: /feature-development, /agent-development. Gate Artifact: walkthrough.md
P4_Build.use_when: Architecture is approved and actual code generation/modification is required.
P4_Build.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow feature-development
best_practices: Use TDD (Test-Driven Development) cycles.
Generate a walkthrough.md with terminal logs and visual evidence upon completion.

P5_Test_Eval.description: Goal: Verification and Quality Assessment. Workflows: /agent-testing, /quality-gate. Gate Artifact: eval-report.md
P5_Test_Eval.use_when: The build phase is finished and code needs strict validation against PRD requirements.
P5_Test_Eval.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow agent-testing
best_practices: Run automated tests first.
Employ a Bug-Hunter persona if tests fail.
Do not proceed to Deploy until the quality gate passes.

P6_Deploy.description: Goal: Release generation. Workflows: /release-management. Gate Artifact: release-notes.md
P6_Deploy.use_when: Testing is complete and the codebase is ready to be version-bumped and shipped.
P6_Deploy.code_example: conda run -p D:\Anaconda\envs\cursor-factory python cli/factory_cli.py run-workflow release-management
best_practices: Use standard changelog generation.
Sync technical catalogs and meta-artifacts before tagging.

P7_Monitor.description: Goal: Production Observation. Workflows: /monitor, /debug-pipeline. Gate Artifact: monitor-report.md
P7_Monitor.use_when: The feature is live and requires telemetry review or incident response.
best_practices: Monitor error rates and trace logs.
Feed insights back into the P1 Ideation phase to create continuous improvement loops.
Always define a clear Gate Artifact for each phase.
Ensure user approval at every phase boundary.
Synchronize technical catalogs before tagging releases.
